interiors.label: Long Hanging
interiors.description: A single full-height rod for dresses, coats and long garments.

interiors.label: Full Hanging
interiors.description: A short rod at the top, a fixed shelf below, then two adjustable shelves.

interiors.label: Double Hang
interiors.description: A short rod at the top, a fixed middle shelf, and a short rod below — twice the hanging space.

interiors.label: Shoe Section
interiors.description: Angled shelves that display shoes front-facing.

interiors.label: Shelving
interiors.description: Movable shelves for folded clothes and bins.

interiors.label: Drawer
interiors.description: Four 10" drawers with a counter shelf and two adjustable shelves above.

shapes.label: L-Shaped
shapes.description: Two walls meeting at a 90° corner.

hardwareStyles.label: Modern Pull
hardwareStyles.description: Recessed rectangular pull with an angled channel.

hardwareStyles.label: Bar Pull
hardwareStyles.description: Straight cylindrical bar on two posts.

hardwareStyles.label: Edge Pull
hardwareStyles.description: Tapered angled edge-pull with a thin profile.
